title: [Bug]: View 'SCHEMATA' always shows default data instead of actual data.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_schema (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_schema (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Schema 1');
INSERT INTO test_schema (id, name) VALUES (2, NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_schema WHERE name IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_schema WHERE created_at < DATETIME('now', '-1 day');
key_bug_features: View 'SCHEMATA' shows default data instead of actual data
